description:
Apply 300ms debounce to search fields, autocomplete, and real-time filter controls. Throttle scroll event listeners.

**Rationale:** Prevents costly re-renders and excessive API calls on every keystroke. Reduces search-related network calls by 70-90%.
title: Debounced search and filter inputs
